name: timm (PyTorch Image Models)

auth.notes: Local library; HuggingFace Hub for pretrained weights

performance.notes: Efficient model implementations; many models have FUSED attention; GPU-optimized

agent_readiness.notes: The most comprehensive collection of SOTA image models in PyTorch. 700+ models: ResNet, EfficientNet, ViT, Swin Transformer, ConvNeXt, DeiT, CLIP-visual, and more. Pretrained weights from ImageNet and other datasets. Feature extraction API. Model benchmarking. Training utilities. `timm.create_model('efficientnet_b0', pretrained=True)` — simple API. HuggingFace Hub integration. The go-to library for computer vision model building and transfer learning.

gotchas: 700+ models — choosing the right one requires knowledge
Some models have very different preprocessing requirements
timm v1.x changed some APIs from 0.x
Not all models support all features (ONNX export, scripting)
best_when: CV transfer learning with SOTA pretrained models
Benchmarking image models for your task
Feature extraction from images for downstream tasks
Training custom CV models starting from pretrained weights
summary: timm (PyTorch Image Models) is the most comprehensive collection of SOTA image models in PyTorch — 700+ models including ResNet, EfficientNet, ViT, Swin, ConvNeXt. Simple API: `timm.create_model('vit_base_patch16_224', pretrained=True)`. HuggingFace Hub. Feature extraction and training utilities. The go-to library for CV transfer learning and model benchmarking.
